sections.title: NVIDIA Fit
sections.content:
- **TensorRT-LLM** addresses **high_inference_cost**
  TensorRT-LLM optimizes LLM inference on NVIDIA GPUs, reducing cost per token.

- **Triton Inference Server** addresses **high_inference_cost**
  Triton manages multi-model inference efficiently, lowering total infrastructure cost.

- **NVIDIA NIM** addresses **high_inference_cost**
  NIM packages optimized models for cost-efficient self-hosted inference.

- **TensorRT-LLM** addresses **high_latency**
  TensorRT-LLM reduces latency through kernel fusion and quantization.

- **Triton Inference Server** addresses **high_latency**
  Triton enables concurrent model execution and dynamic batching for low latency.

- **NVIDIA NIM** addresses **high_latency**
  NIM offers pre-optimized inference endpoints with minimal overhead.

- **NVIDIA RAPIDS** addresses **heavy_tabular_processing**
  RAPIDS accelerates tabular data processing and ML on GPU.

- **cuML** addresses **heavy_tabular_processing**
  cuML provides GPU-accelerated implementations of common ML algorithms.

- **NVIDIA Riva** addresses **voice_need**
  Riva provides GPU-accelerated speech-to-text and text-to-speech.

- **NVIDIA NIM** addresses **voice_need**
  NIM includes optimized voice AI microservices for production.

- **NVIDIA Omniverse** addresses **simulation_need**
  Omniverse enables physics-accurate simulation and digital twin creation.

- **NVIDIA AI Enterprise** addresses **computer_vision_need**
  AI Enterprise includes TensorRT-optimized computer vision pipelines.

- **NVIDIA TensorRT** addresses **computer_vision_need**
  TensorRT optimizes CV model inference for real-time applications.

- **NVIDIA NIM** addresses **computer_vision_need**
  NIM provides pre-built CV inference microservices.

- **NVIDIA Isaac** addresses **robotics_need**
  Isaac platform provides robotics simulation, training, and deployment.

- **NVIDIA Omniverse** addresses **robotics_need**
  Omniverse enables photorealistic simulation for robotics training.

- **NVIDIA Morpheus** addresses **ai_cybersecurity_need**
  Morpheus provides GPU-accelerated cybersecurity AI pipeline.

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA NIM
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
NVIDIA NIM provides optimized microservices for inference on NVIDIA GPUs.
It packages models into ready-to-deploy containers with optimized runtimes,
reducing the need for third-party API dependencies. NIM supports self-hosted
deployment with full data sovereignty.

packed_rag_contexts.title: TensorRT-LLM
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
TensorRT-LLM is an open-source library that optimizes large language model
inference on NVIDIA GPUs. It uses kernel fusion, quantization (FP8, INT4,
INT8), and in-flight batching to maximize throughput and minimize latency.
TensorRT-LLM is the recommended inference backend for LLMs in production.

packed_rag_contexts.title: Triton Inference Server
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
Triton Inference Server is a high-performance inference serving platform
that supports multiple frameworks (TensorRT, PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX).
It provides dynamic batching, concurrent model execution, and model
ensemble capabilities. Triton is designed for production-grade AI
deployments requiring low latency and high throughput.

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA RAPIDS
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
NVIDIA RAPIDS is a suite of open-source GPU-accelerated data science libraries.
cuDF provides a pandas-like DataFrame API for GPU-accelerated ETL, while cuML
offers GPU implementations of popular machine learning algorithms. RAPIDS
accelerates data pipelines by 5-10x compared to CPU-only processing.

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA RAPIDS
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Keywords
RAPIDS, cuDF, cuML, GPU, data pipeline, ETL, tabular, machine learning, DataFrame

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA Riva
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
NVIDIA Riva is a GPU-accelerated speech AI SDK that provides real-time
speech-to-text (STT), text-to-speech (TTS), and neural language modeling.
Riva supports multiple languages including Brazilian Portuguese, with
customizable models for domain-specific vocabulary and accents.

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA Omniverse
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
NVIDIA Omniverse is a platform for building and operating physically accurate
3D simulations and digital twins. It enables real-time collaboration,
physically based rendering, and physics simulation for industries ranging
from manufacturing to robotics. Omniverse supports USD (Universal Scene
Description) as its foundation.

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA Isaac
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
NVIDIA Isaac is a platform for developing, simulating, and deploying AI-powered
robots. Isaac Sim provides physically accurate simulation environments for
training and testing robotic models. Isaac ROS offers GPU-accelerated ROS 2
packages for real-world robot deployment.

packed_rag_contexts.title: NVIDIA Morpheus
packed_rag_contexts.content:
## Description
NVIDIA Morpheus is a GPU-accelerated AI cybersecurity framework for real-time
threat detection, anomaly detection, and security data processing. It provides
pre-built pipelines for cybersecurity use cases including network flow
analysis, log processing, and sensitive information detection. Morpheus
processes security events at speeds 10x faster than CPU-based solutions.
